item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-023","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response explicitly limits the long-term bullish premise and refuses to infer an immediate leveraged second-home purchase from it. It shifts the analysis to MPG-relevant path volatility and carrier exposure: leverage, cash flow, interest costs, liquidity, policy risk, vacancy, exit difficulty, and stress-test triggers. It gives a conditional verdict rather than following the trend into a single-point buy conclusion."}
